findings.issue: Operating on a tight budget of ~$100/month
findings.recommended_fix: Explore cost-saving measures or funding opportunities

findings.issue: Irregular work schedule (3am sessions) may lead to burnout
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a consistent, healthy work schedule

findings.issue: Sometimes makes rapid decisions (e.g., publishing CLI, giving EIN)
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure thorough consideration of consequences before making critical decisions
